response.justification: The candidate lacks critical required qualifications including C programming for UNIX embedded systems, Linux kernel modification experience, native-level Japanese proficiency, and any demonstrable background in embedded networking, security protocols (e.g., MACsec, 802.1X), or switch firmware development — all essential for this role.
strengths: Strong full-stack experience across multiple languages and platforms
Demonstrated open-source contributions and tooling development
Proven ability to work in complex, distributed systems and DevOps environments
concerns: No evidence of C programming in embedded or UNIX kernel contexts
No Japanese language proficiency — a mandatory requirement
No experience with LAN-switch products, network security features, or embedded hardware control

key_factors.factor: Absence of Network Security Domain Knowledge
